artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a humble folding card table crowned with a tin cash box overflowing with crumpled bills and coins, ringed by half-eaten casseroles and a few stray frosted treats, glowing in golden afternoon light on a sunlit town green. Picket fences and blank lawn placards blur softly behind. The laden table fills the lower wide frame, warm light pouring down. Wide 4:3 landscape, Selesnya leafy green and warm ivory, wholesome civic fervor, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Bake Sale Treasury
text:
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. (You spotted a neighbor for a brownie. The campaign is good for it.)
flavorText: All proceeds go to the recall, minus what the kids ate, minus what Dale ate, minus what was definitely there a minute ago.
